mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_group (group_id, user_id) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, group_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at, COUNT(ug_all.user_id)::integer AS member_count FROM groups g INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = g.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_group ug_all ON ug_all.group_id = g.group_id GROUP BY g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at ORDER BY ug.joined_at DESC, g.group_id DESC

SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at, COUNT(ug_all.user_id)::integer AS member_count FROM groups g INNER JOIN user_group ug ON ug.group_id = g.group_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_group ug_all ON ug_all.group_id = g.group_id WHERE g.group_id = #{groupId} GROUP BY g.group_id, g.group_name, g.owner_id, g.created_at, ug.joined_at

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.name, u.email, u.profile_image_url, (g.owner_id = u.id) AS owner, ug.joined_at FROM user_group ug INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = ug.user_id INNER JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = ug.group_id WHERE ug.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY owner DESC, ug.joined_at ASC, u.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_join_requests (group_id, user_id, status, requested_at, resolved_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, 'PENDING', now(), NULL) ON CONFLICT (group_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'PENDING', requested_at = now(), resolved_at = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT gjr.request_id, gjr.group_id, gjr.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.profile_image_url, gjr.status, gjr.requested_at, gjr.resolved_at FROM group_join_requests gjr INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = gjr.user_id WHERE gjr.group_id = #{groupId} AND gjr.request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT gjr.request_id, gjr.group_id, gjr.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.profile_image_url, gjr.status, gjr.requested_at, gjr.resolved_at FROM group_join_requests gjr INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = gjr.user_id WHERE gjr.group_id = #{groupId} AND gjr.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT gjr.request_id, gjr.group_id, gjr.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.profile_image_url, gjr.status, gjr.requested_at, gjr.resolved_at FROM group_join_requests gjr INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = gjr.user_id WHERE gjr.group_id = #{groupId} AND gjr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY gjr.requested_at ASC, gjr.request_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_join_requests SET status = 'APPROVED', resolved_at = now() WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: WITH completed_trip_regions AS ( SELECT t.trip_id, a.sido_code, a.gugun_code, COUNT(*)::integer AS attraction_count FROM trips t CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements( CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(t.data -> 'items') = 'array' THEN t.data -> 'items' ELSE '[]'::jsonb END ) item INNER JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = CASE WHEN COALESCE(item ->> 'content_id', item ->> 'contentId') ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN COALESCE(item ->> 'content_id', item ->> 'contentId')::integer ELSE NULL END WHERE t.group_id = #{groupId} AND t.end_date < CURRENT_DATE AND a.sido_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.trip_id, a.sido_code, a.gugun_code ) SELECT ctr.sido_code, s.sido_name, ctr.gugun_code, g.gugun_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.trip_id)::integer AS visit_count, SUM(ctr.attraction_count)::integer AS attraction_count, grm.media_type AS representative_media_type, grm.media_url AS representative_media_url, ST_Y(grm.geom) AS latitude, ST_X(grm.geom) AS longitude FROM completed_trip_regions ctr INNER JOIN sidos s ON s.sido_code = ctr.sido_code LEFT JOIN guguns g ON g.sido_code = ctr.sido_code AND g.gugun_code = ctr.gugun_code LEFT JOIN group_region_media grm ON grm.group_id = #{groupId} AND grm.sido_code = ctr.sido_code AND COALESCE(grm.gugun_code, -1) = COALESCE(ctr.gugun_code, -1) GROUP BY ctr.sido_code, s.sido_name, ctr.gugun_code, g.gugun_name, grm.media_type, grm.media_url, grm.geom ORDER BY visit_count DESC, attraction_count DESC, ctr.sido_code ASC, ctr.gugun_code ASC
